personas.label: Fresh visitor
personas.description: First-time visitor. Has never heard of this site. No cookies, no storage, no referrer. No preconceptions about what the site is or does.
personas.llm_framing: You are a first-time visitor who has never heard of this site and has no context about what it offers. You are evaluating whether this is worth your time.

personas.label: Returning visitor
personas.description: Has visited this site once before and has some vague memory of what it is. Cookies indicate a prior session but no account.
personas.llm_framing: You visited this site about two weeks ago and have a vague sense of what it is, but you can't remember specifics. You're back to check on something or complete an action you started.

personas.label: Engaged lead
personas.description: Has visited multiple times, subscribed to email updates. Has not purchased or created an account yet. Is actively evaluating the offering.
personas.llm_framing: You subscribed to this site's email list. You've been reading their updates and are actively evaluating whether to engage further (attend, buy, register). You have specific questions.

personas.label: Authenticated user
personas.description: Logged in. Has an account. Expects personalised state (their saved items, their dashboard, their name).

seed.seed_notes: The session cookie is a placeholder. For journeys against real auth-gated sites, the runner needs a live login flow or a test account — out of scope for v0.3.

personas.llm_framing: You are logged in to this site and have used it before. You expect to see your own dashboard / saved items / profile. If something looks generic or unpersonalised, that's surprising.
